faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Montclair, NJ?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Montclair typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Montclair?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Montclair locations. Our team understands that cockroach infestations require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response times to prevent the problem from spreading throughout your home or business.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Montclair, NJ?
faqs.answer: Montclair properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches in basements and crawl spaces. We also occasionally treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded roaches, customizing our approach based on the species identified during inspection.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and offer eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will provide you with clear instructions for any necessary precautions before and after treatment.
